heading: Applicability to Tennessee Valley Authority
label: 666c Applicability to Tennessee Valley Authority
text: The provisions of this Act shall not apply to the Tennessee Valley Authority.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , known as the Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act, which is classified generally to sections 661 to 666c–1 of this title.
